title: Maintenance in progress
default_message: The application is currently under maintenance. Thank you for your patience.
admin_description: Enable maintenance mode to block access for non-administrator users.
activate_confirm: Are you sure you want to enable maintenance mode?
deactivate_confirm: Are you sure you want to disable maintenance mode?
message_placeholder: Message displayed to users during maintenance...
bypass_roles_help: Users with these roles will be able to access the application during maintenance.
